allow: Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT current_database\(\) AS db, current_user AS usr")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT id, name, portfolio_files FROM candidates WHERE id = '492f7f30-fe4a-44a8-8c13-e61d376b1fd1'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT jsonb_pretty\(portfolio_files\) AS pf FROM candidates WHERE id = '492f7f30-fe4a-44a8-8c13-e61d376b1fd1'")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'candidates' AND column_name IN \('portfolio_files', 'portfolio_links', 'pre_survey_data', 'pre_survey_completed_at', 'pre_survey_template_id'\) ORDER BY column_name")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT content FROM approval_documents WHERE doc_number = 'AP-2026-0026'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT jsonb_pretty\(content->'completed'\) AS completed FROM approval_documents WHERE doc_number = 'AP-2026-0026'")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name NOT IN \('pg_catalog','information_schema','pg_toast','auth','storage','extensions','graphql','graphql_public','realtime','supabase_functions','vault','net','pgsodium','pgsodium_masks','_realtime','supabase_migrations','cron'\) ORDER BY schema_name")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT doc_type, status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt, COALESCE\(SUM\(amount\),0\) AS total_amount FROM approval_documents WHERE doc_type IN \('expense','purchase'\) GROUP BY doc_type, status ORDER BY doc_type, status")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT CASE WHEN table_name LIKE 'cs_%' THEN 'cs' WHEN table_name LIKE 'mall_%' THEN 'mall' WHEN table_name LIKE 'finance_%' THEN 'finance' WHEN table_name LIKE 'fin_%' THEN 'fin' ELSE 'other' END AS prefix, COUNT\(*\) AS tables FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY tables DESC")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND \(table_name LIKE '%order%' OR table_name LIKE '%payment%' OR table_name LIKE '%settlement%' OR table_name LIKE '%invoice%' OR table_name LIKE '%transaction%' OR table_name LIKE '%cost%' OR table_name LIKE '%expense%' OR table_name LIKE '%mall%' OR table_name LIKE '%finance%' OR table_name LIKE '%revenue%' OR table_name LIKE '%sales%'\) ORDER BY table_name")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT nspname FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname NOT LIKE 'pg_%' AND nspname NOT IN \('information_schema'\) ORDER BY nspname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT n.nspname AS schema, c.relname AS table FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname IN \('cs','finance','mall'\) AND c.relkind='r' ORDER BY n.nspname, c.relname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT table_schema, table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE \(table_schema, table_name\) IN \(\('finance','fixed_cost_entries'\),\('finance','fixed_cost_monthly_records'\),\('finance','cash_plan_expense_lines'\),\('mall','purchase_requests'\)\) ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT 'finance.fixed_cost_monthly_records' AS tbl, count\(*\) AS cnt FROM finance.fixed_cost_monthly_records UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.fixed_cost_entries', count\(*\) FROM finance.fixed_cost_entries UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.cash_plan_expense_lines', count\(*\) FROM finance.cash_plan_expense_lines UNION ALL SELECT 'mall.purchase_requests', count\(*\) FROM mall.purchase_requests UNION ALL SELECT 'mall.point_grants', count\(*\) FROM mall.point_grants UNION ALL SELECT 'public.approval_documents expense', count\(*\) FROM public.approval_documents WHERE doc_type IN \('expense','purchase'\)")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT n.nspname AS schema, c.relname AS tbl FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname IN \('public','cs','finance','mall'\) AND c.relkind='r' AND \(c.relname ILIKE '%ai%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%api%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%usage%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%token%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%cost%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%llm%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%credit%' OR c.relname ILIKE '%log%'\) ORDER BY n.nspname, c.relname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT n.nspname AS schema, c.relname AS tbl, a.attname AS col FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid=c.oid AND a.attnum>0 AND NOT a.attisdropped WHERE n.nspname IN \('public','cs','finance','mall'\) AND c.relkind='r' AND \(a.attname ILIKE '%cost%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%token%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%_usage%' OR a.attname ILIKE 'usage%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%api_call%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%credit%'\) ORDER BY n.nspname, c.relname, a.attname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='finance' AND table_name IN \('ai_reports','fixed_cost_ai_reports','pnl_ai_reports'\) ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT 'finance.ai_reports' AS tbl, count\(*\) AS cnt FROM finance.ai_reports UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.fixed_cost_ai_reports', count\(*\) FROM finance.fixed_cost_ai_reports UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.pnl_ai_reports', count\(*\) FROM finance.pnl_ai_reports UNION ALL SELECT 'public.meeting_records w/ stt_cost', count\(*\) FROM public.meeting_records WHERE stt_cost IS NOT NULL")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT 'finance.ai_reports' AS tbl, count\(*\) AS cnt FROM finance.ai_reports UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.fixed_cost_ai_reports', count\(*\) FROM finance.fixed_cost_ai_reports UNION ALL SELECT 'finance.pnl_ai_reports', count\(*\) FROM finance.pnl_ai_reports")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT n.nspname AS schema, c.relname AS tbl, a.attname AS col FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid=c.oid AND a.attnum>0 AND NOT a.attisdropped WHERE n.nspname='public' AND c.relkind='r' AND \(a.attname ILIKE '%stt%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%cost%' OR a.attname ILIKE '%duration%'\) ORDER BY c.relname, a.attname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='employees' AND \(column_name ILIKE '%user%' OR column_name ILIKE '%uid%' OR column_name ILIKE '%auth%' OR column_name = 'role' OR column_name='id'\) ORDER BY column_name")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT role, count\(*\) AS cnt FROM public.employees GROUP BY role ORDER BY cnt DESC")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT to_regclass\('public.ai_usage_log'\) AS table_exists, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM pg_proc WHERE proname='get_unified_ai_costs'\) AS rpc_exists")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT 'rpc_direct\(auth null→guard 0행 기대\)' AS check, count\(*\) AS rows FROM public.get_unified_ai_costs\('2025-01-01','2026-12-31'\) UNION ALL SELECT 'finance raw \(guard 통과시 기대치\)', \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM finance.ai_reports\) + \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM finance.fixed_cost_ai_reports\) + \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM finance.pnl_ai_reports\)")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT e.id, e.name, e.role, e.department_id, d.name AS dept FROM public.employees e LEFT JOIN public.departments d ON d.id = e.department_id WHERE e.name LIKE '%김보미%' OR e.id IN \(SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE email='bm.kim@interohrigin.com'\)")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT id, name, role, position, department_id FROM public.employees WHERE name LIKE '%보미%'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='cs' AND table_name='platform_access_allowlist' ORDER BY ordinal_position")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT name FROM public.departments WHERE id='063197e4-375c-47ac-9342-991149398128'")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT user_id, email, reason, expires_at, allowed_routes FROM cs.platform_access_allowlist WHERE email='bm.kim@interohrigin.com' OR user_id='a78f528d-29a3-42ac-8525-a5abb1379fc5'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='employees' ORDER BY ordinal_position")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT name, role, iocs_access FROM public.employees WHERE id = 'a78f528d-29a3-42ac-8525-a5abb1379fc5'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "UPDATE public.employees SET iocs_access = true WHERE id = 'a78f528d-29a3-42ac-8525-a5abb1379fc5'")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT polname, cmd, pg_get_expr\(polqual, polrelid\) AS using_expr FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid='public.employees'::regclass AND polcmd IN \('r','*'\) ORDER BY polname")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT polname, polcmd, pg_get_expr\(polqual, polrelid\) AS using_expr FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid='public.employees'::regclass ORDER BY polname")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='leave_requests' ORDER BY ordinal_position")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT con.conname, pg_get_constraintdef\(con.oid\) AS def FROM pg_constraint con JOIN pg_class rel ON rel.oid = con.conrelid JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = rel.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname='public' AND rel.relname='leave_requests' AND con.contype='c'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT tg.tgname FROM pg_trigger tg JOIN pg_class rel ON rel.oid = tg.tgrelid WHERE rel.relname='leave_requests' AND NOT tg.tgisinternal")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT role, count\(*\) FROM public.employees WHERE is_active=true GROUP BY role ORDER BY role")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT pg_get_functiondef\(oid\) AS def FROM pg_proc WHERE proname IN \('trigger_leave_balance','update_leave_balance'\)")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT to_regclass\('public.emergency_leave_requests'\) AS tbl, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid='public.emergency_leave_requests'::regclass\) AS policies, \(SELECT public::text FROM storage.buckets WHERE id='emergency-leave-files'\) AS bucket_public")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "CREATE POLICY emergency_leave_files_insert ON storage.objects FOR INSERT TO authenticated WITH CHECK \(bucket_id='emergency-leave-files' AND \(storage.foldername\(name\)\)[1] = auth.uid\(\)::text\)")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "CREATE POLICY emergency_leave_files_select ON storage.objects FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING \(bucket_id='emergency-leave-files' AND \(\(storage.foldername\(name\)\)[1] = auth.uid\(\)::text OR EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM public.employees e WHERE e.id=auth.uid\(\) AND e.role IN \('director','division_head','ceo','admin','hr_admin'\)\)\)\)")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT polname FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid='storage.objects'::regclass AND polname LIKE 'emergency_leave%'")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT extname FROM pg_extension WHERE extname IN \('pg_cron','pg_net'\)")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT jobname, schedule FROM cron.job")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='daily_reports' ORDER BY ordinal_position")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='project_boards' ORDER BY ordinal_position")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='employees' AND column_name IN \('id','name','email','role','is_active'\)")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT jobname, command FROM cron.job WHERE jobname LIKE '%reminder%' OR jobname LIKE '%notify%' ORDER BY jobname")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT extname FROM pg_extension WHERE extname IN \('pg_net','http','http_request','wrappers'\)")
Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT nspname FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname IN \('vault','supabase_functions','net'\)")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT current_setting\('app.supabase_url', true\) AS supa_url, \(current_setting\('app.service_role_key', true\) IS NOT NULL\) AS has_service_key, current_setting\('app.cf_base_url', true\) AS cf_base, \(current_setting\('app.cron_secret', true\) IS NOT NULL\) AS has_cron_secret")

Bash(node scripts/db-exec.mjs --query "SELECT \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name LIKE 'recurring_%'\) AS tables, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM pg_proc WHERE proname IN \('materialize_recurring_occurrences','pick_recurring_reminders','pick_recurring_missed'\)\) AS rpcs")
